plugins.prepareCmd: npm version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version && sed -i "s/versionCode [0-9]*/versionCode $VERSION_CODE/" android/app/build.gradle && sed -i "s/versionName \"[^\"]*\"/versionName \"${nextRelease.version}\"/" android/app/build.gradle && npm run build -- --configuration production && npx cap sync android && cd android && chmod +x gradlew && ./gradlew assembleRelease bundleRelease
